error_signature: mobile nav bar behind browser's address bar
title: Mobile nav bar obscured by browser's address bar
symptom: The mobile navigation bar is positioned behind the browser's address bar on iOS devices, making it initially invisible until the address bar shrinks.
applies_when: Implementing a mobile nav bottom bar
not_this_if: Nav bar is correctly displayed on desktop browsers
Address bar is not present or is in a different position
root_cause: Mobile browsers on iOS have a bottom address bar that overlaps with fixed-position elements at the bottom of the viewport, causing layout issues for components like navigation bars.
fix_steps: Insert a new div that wraps the entire mobile nav bar
Set the 'Position' property of the new div to 'Fixed'
Align the new div to the bottom of the screen by setting 'Bottom' to 0
agent_instruction: Wrap the mobile nav bar in a fixed-position div aligned to the bottom of the screen.
